title: lycopodium lucidulum var. occidentale
intro: Lycopodium lucidulum var. occidentale, also known as Western running club moss, is a type of lycopodiaceous plant that belongs to the club moss family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Western running club moss include its ability to reduce congestion and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory infections, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tinctures, teas, and capsules, and is traditionally used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of health conditions.
